title: Ultimate Ore
description: This mod adds Ultimate Ore to the game, you can craft tools and armor with this Ultimate Ore
body:
This mod adds Ultimate Ore to the game, you can craft tools and armor with this Ultimate Ore
The main purpose of the mode is to become stronger after completing the game. Of course, this may be a bit boring, but why not, right?
We cannot say that there will be updates to this mode, it is in beta phase.

The power of each tool is nearly 2 times stronger than netherite, the same for armor.

The mod was made with MCREATOR
